transcript.text:
This is my first time here as well I'm pretty excited
[Gamaekjip]
Cutie!
I love how you munch the food
Thank you
I'm kinda scared now
It's horrific at this point
Hello everyone~
I'm here at Eulji-ro today
This is the alley of Eulji-ro
There's a type of restaurant called gamaekjip
It's like an old convenient store where you can shop, eat, and order a few simple menus such as jjigae (stew and ramen)
This is my first time, so I'm looking forward to it!
[Eulji-ro Alley]
This alley looks really old
I think I found it!

It's crowded over there
What is the best main dish here?
kkongchi jjigae (pike mackerel stew) and LA Galbi (Korean short ribs)!
But they ran out of LA Galbi for today. We came early
I personally like ogyeopsal (five layered pork belly) better than dwaeji galbi (Korean port ribs)
They cook them for you as well
Thank you~
I guess they ran out of LA Galbi.. I was looking forward to it tho..
This place is so crowded
[Eulji-ro, Million Dollar Convenient Store ]
So I can eat all this snacks as much as I want if I buy them
They have many different kinds of snacks!
I was expecting only a few simple menus because this place is a gamaekjip
But they actually have a wide range of menu including bossam, galbi, and ogyeopsal
Excuse me~
May I please order? For sure

Are you out of LA galbi? Yes, we are
Then, 1 order of bossam (boiled pork belly), 1 order of dwaeji galbi, 1 order of ogyeopsal, 1 gochujang jjigae (Korean spicy sauce stew), and....
What now??? I have to write it down
You gotta help me out
2 orders of ogyeopsal, 2 orders of dwaeji galbi, and 1 gochujang jjigae for now
It's going to take a while since we cook the meat for you
What should I eat while waiting?
(golbangyi)
Golbaengyi (sea snail) is not on the menu tho.. Do they have it?
It's on the menu
Oh, can I just grab and eat it right away?
For real?!
What about beondegi (silkwarm pupae)?
We can boil it for you
Wow, that's wassup!
They said they will season the golbaengi and boil this beondegi as well

Let's get this two
What kind of snack should I grab?
[She found her favorite] It's called "Homerun ball"
Since I like unseasoned golbangyi as well, I'm just going to eat it straight out of the can
Should I ask him to boil the beongdegi tho? You know, bundaegi jjigae is amazing
It's very interesting because it's not on the menu
[Ogyeopsal]
[Bossam]
[Dwaeji-Galbi]
Waiting the food is usually the hardest part at a restaurant
But here they have a bunch of snacks for appetizer
[That was quick]
They all look amazing
I'll eat up the ogyeopsal first because it tastes bad when it gets cold
Bon Appetit!
Ssamjang!

This is super chewy
I like ogyeopsal better than samgyeopsal because opgyeopsal comes with the skin
So delicious
Mumallaengi (Seasoned dried radish)! Let's try it
Delicious
It's usually really bitter
With a slice of bossam
Gat-Kimchi (leaf mustard kimchi) on top
and also put mumallaengi on top
I still can't believe that this convenient store has a restaurant set up inside and sells bossam
Thank you My pleasure
Mumallaengi
Both ogyeopsal and bossam are more like chewy rather than tender
Galbi! Must be delicious
It looks super tasty
No way

So far, dwaeji galbi is the best
Wish I could've had LA Galbi...
That makes me sad.. It must be really tasty
There's no way this convenient store can provide such a high quality pork
No way
It's so delicious
I was amazed at this place for having a wide range of menu at first
But now I am even more amazed with its quality and taste
The galbi is so tender
Jjigae!
I heard that this place is known for gochujang jjigae
The guy I met earlier ouside told me to get kkongchi jjigae,
but I ordered this because it's more popular here
It looks super tasty
The soup looks really think
Oh my..

I feel like drinking now..
It's really thick
OMG, the meat is so tender too
I feel like this was braised in broth for like years
The meat melted in my mouth, and it was not the fat
Wow... look at that jjapagheti
I'm going to order one later
A mumallaengi on top of the samgyeopsal slice
I do this every time at a TV program called "My Hometown at 6 o'clock"
[Skewering all the meat]
I don't think even athletes can eat that much
That's scary
She does eat a lot
Unnie, you're so cute~
[Shy]
You're so pretty!!

Give her a round of applause
[Proposing out of nowhere]
Tzuyang! Tzuyang! Tzuyang!
[Congrats]
Thank y'all!
Beondegi jjigae! Please put it right here
Thank you very much
Wow, is this all from 1 can?
I love the portion!
Oh my... wow, this is it..
[Amazed]
The depth of flavor is amazing.. It's spicy and nice
I can only eat this without looking at it
[Hot]
There's quite a number of people who can't eat beondegi
but it's so good

I wouldn't have tried it if I did not know the taste of it
So good
It's amazing
I wish they had a bibimmyeon
Bibimmyeon and golbaengi are a perfect combination
[gnawing the meat off the bone]
Since I finished all main dishes except for the jjigae
I'll get some dessert
SPAM
Excuse me~ Could you please cook this SPAM?
And 1 order of japagheti and 1 order of ramen please
Thank you~
Oh no!
[How dare you ruin it...]
(Sorry)
Normally, their grilled SPAM comes with the sliced cucumber, but they changed it to fried egg for me

This egg is definitely half-cooked
Danggg, look at this
WOW
It's just a typical ramen But why is this so good?
It's tasty
Why doesn't it taste the same when I cook it at home?!
I can't cook it like this at home
This is no joke
SPAM!
It's well cooked
Dang
But how? That's so crazy She's super tiny...
You are incredible
Thank you
Even sumo wrestlers will not eat that much
Wow

With pa-kimchi (green onion kimchi)
Jjapaghetti itself was so delicious that I forgot about the pa-kimchi
Are you married? No, not yet..
Your husband should make good money
Nah, he should be fine
(I actually worry about him)
It's getting horrific now...
I only have 10 min left, so I gotta hurry up
Wrap it with the noodles
This jjapaghetti is amazing
And the ramen too
[Done]
I really enjoyed the meal
I'll probably come back here to drink because they have all the good snacks and foods
This place is more like a pub rather than a restaurant
The foods really make me feel like drinking

Thanks for watching everyone!
So, you ordered..
bossam, ogyeopsal, dwaeji-galbi, gochujang jjigae, beondegi, golbaengi, snacks, jjapaghetti, omg...
spam, ramen, and drinks
You did eat a lot..
And the total is $150
How the hell do you eat this much?
Do you carry some type of food bag on your body?
